calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-26-2012 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-26-2009 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-26-2009 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Apr-03-12 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Settlement Conference. Commissioner William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Jonathan Ayers, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Ford Motor Credit Company, LLC.
Pepe Rodriguez, Field Service Representative for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
Michael Heath, Esq. appeared with defendant Subing Cen, who was placed under oath and examined.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on September 3, 2008.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, January 26, 2009.

Terms of the Settlement Agreement were read into the record by Mr. Ayers. In accordance with the agreement of the parties, defendant Subing Cen shall pay plaintiff Ford Motor Credit Company, LLC the compromised sum of $4,788.00. Said amount shall be paid in monthly installments of $133.00 commencing February 15, 2009, and continuing for thirty-six consective months until paid in full. All payments are due on the 15th of each month. No interest shall accrue on the compromised sum of $4,788.00.

If defendant Subing Cen's payments are not received by plaintiff by the 15th of each month, counsel for plaintiff will notify Mr. Heath, counsel for defendant, via facsimile of the failure to make payment, and defendant Subing Cen shall have ten days to cure the failure to pay. If defendant Subing Cen does not cure the failure to pay, plaintiff may, upon ex parte application, obtain judgment against defendant Subing Cen for the full balance of $13,161.00.

Agreement of the parties was accepted by the Court. Mr. Ayers shall reduce the terms of this agreement to writing.

This matter is continued to April 3, 2012 @ 10:00 a.m. in Department 212 on the CRC 3.1385 Dismissal Calendar.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Dec-05-2008 Continued To Jan-26-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
